signals.headline: South Korea Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026, Below Forecasts | YES | MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, missing market expectations of 2.4% amid contained price pressures before global energy volatility.[1]
